name: Discord
description: Monitor Discord server for team membership and communication access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications
2. Create a new application → Bot → Reset Token
3. Enable Server Members Intent under Privileged Gateway Intents
4. Invite the bot to your server with 'View Channels' + 'View Members' permissions
5. Enable Developer Mode in Discord settings, right-click server → Copy ID
6. Enter bot token and server ID below

credentialFields.label: Bot Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Discord Developer Portal → Your App → Bot → Token

credentialFields.label: Server (Guild) ID
credentialFields.helpText: Right-click your Discord server name → Copy Server ID (enable Developer Mode first)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Discord server members with access to team communication channels
